A '''Gand discharger''' was an extremely [[Death/Legends|deadly]] weapon that was capable of paralyzing an enemy just as easily as it was slaying them. They were considered the pinnacle of [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] technology and, as such, were rare items which were treasured by the few Gand who possessed them. Developed around [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], the discharger was considered a sturdy and long-lasting weapon.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
